rationale: OSS edition (all changed paths under web/src/; no enterprise directories touched). The diff introduces a new user-facing UI page at /test-demo — a deterministic, multi-mode test-target surface with interactive selects, cascading selects, a mode toggle (Basic/Advanced), and a conditional combined-rule banner. Three source files are modified: the view itself (TestDemo.vue), the route registration (router.ts), and the nav entry (MainLayout.vue). No API endpoints are added or altered. No existing Playwright tests are present in the diff. No explicit opt-out signal was provided (feature_hint.txt and trigger_comment.txt are both empty). The page does not belong to a specific product area (Logs/Metrics/Traces/etc.), so it is placed in GeneralTests alongside other cross-cutting test specs. The spec will join the existing GeneralTests group in the Playwright CI matrix.
